_meta.title: haa_c curriculum graph — F2-INTERIM STARTER (isolated-form only)
_meta.status: DRAFT — signedOff:false. The mother signs the starter content + reps in her re-confirmation packet.
_meta.starter_2026_07_20: F2-INTERIM STARTER (owner decision 2026-07-20, quick task 260720-wcs). haa_c (ح, introOrder 6 — NOT haa_f, the other haa at introOrder 26) is promoted as an isolated-form-only STARTER unit: its letters.json row carries base referenceStrokes (1) + 4 commonMistakes but ZERO contextualForms, so the isolated form is the ONLY honest scope. The 3 nodes (meet -> trace isolated -> write isolated) are ALL essential so a child can clean-rep them to the mastery star. writeLetter.fromSound / fromPicture are OMITTED (they need absent haa_c word audio/images; inventing vocab is banned). The full draft in docs/curriculum/drafts/{graphs,exercises}/06-haa_c.* is NOT promoted (it mirrors taa's reach-ahead shape; with the allowlist now EMPTY any reach-ahead card fails the four-layer wall). minCleanReps:1 is the A2 demo-era precedent — FLAG for the mother's packet. haa_c has NO dot — the exercise 'dot' criterion is a draft template artifact the mother confirms/strips.
_meta.reviewNote: Confirm the isolated-form starter scope + reps=1 + the no-dot criteria; author the fuller unit (contextual forms, words) when ready.
